# setSelectedItems(_:)

**Instance Method**

Set the selectedItems property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setSelectedItems(_ items: [UInt32]) throws
```

## Parameters

- **items**: An array of UInt32s that are the IDs of the items currently selected.
